name: Momonga
description:
__Height:__ 251 cm (8'3")
__Affiliations:__ Marines G-1 Branch

Vice-Admiral Momonga (モモンガ中将, Momonga Chūjō) is one of the five Vice-admirals, who lead the Buster Call on Enies Lobby. He eventually returns as the Marine representative meeting with Shichibukai member Boa Hancock near her home island of Amazon Lily.
